U3-FM-01: compare each recipient share side by side
ask whether anyone got more or less
U3-FM-02: use visible food or strip models
separate same number from same amount
U3-FM-03: distribute concrete objects one at a time
simplify to two recipients before increasing complexity
U3-FM-04: map fair-set sharing to fair-whole partitioning
use parallel object and whole examples
ask what stays the same about fairness
